description: This file defines a repository class AssetsRepository for performing MongoDB operations related to assets/devices. It includes methods for creating, retrieving, listing, updating assets, and ensuring indexes.

classes.name: AssetsRepository
classes.description: A repository class that manages MongoDB operations for assets/devices, extending from BaseRepository.

methods.name: col(self)
methods.description: Property that returns the MongoDB collection for assets.

methods.name: None ensure_indexes(self)
methods.description: Creates unique indexes on the asset_tag field within the collection.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None get_by_id(self, asset_id: ObjectId)
methods.description: Retrieves an asset document by its ObjectId.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None get_by_asset_tag(self, asset_tag: str)
methods.description: Retrieves an asset document by its asset_tag string.

methods.name: list[dict[str,Any]] list(self, q: str | None = None, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0)
methods.description: Lists asset documents matching an optional search query, with pagination support.

methods.name: dict[str,Any] create(self, doc: dict[str, Any])
methods.description: Creates a new asset document with metadata such as creation timestamp and active status.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None update(self, asset_id: ObjectId, updates: dict[str, Any])
methods.description: Updates an existing asset document by its ObjectId with provided fields.

ctags.name: create
ctags.pattern: /^    async def create(self, doc: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:$/

ctags.name: get_by_asset_tag
ctags.pattern: /^    async def get_by_asset_tag(self, asset_tag: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: get_by_id
ctags.pattern: /^    async def get_by_id(self, asset_id: ObjectId) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: list
ctags.pattern: /^    async def list(self, q: str | None = None, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0) -> list[dict[s/
ctags.signature: (self, q: str | None = None, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0)

ctags.name: update
ctags.pattern: /^    async def update(self, asset_id: ObjectId, updates: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any] | None/
